review_title: Good product with fast learning curve.
description: Very good product with fast learning curve. The support of Sisense is very good, fast response and professional answers.
author: Dima K.
pros: The visualization part is very easy and convenient, there are no many small things to adjust like in other programs
cons: Lack of basic features like font formatting, If you to so you can but only by javascript code.

review_title: Best product for your shift in data analytics
description: Working in healthcare, we needed a powerful tool that would allow us to make our clients capable of easily visualize and understand their data in order to improve their operational productivity as well as the quality of care they dispense to their population of patients. Thanks to Sisense, we offer a complete libary of dashboards and even allow clients to create their own dashboards. It allowed us to bonify our offering and therefore increase our revenues while better serving our clients.
author: Maxime N.
pros: Sisense is easy to install and setup. It easy to use, both on the data modelling and dashboard design aspects. It makes it the perfect tool to quickly set up added value dashboards and begin your shift towards understanding your data. Sisense is also easy to embed and therefore makes it easy to provide our users with self-service analytics. Sisense's customer success team is great and will make sure you quickly see the value of their product through a customized onboarding process.
cons: The fact that multiple data models (elasticube) are competing for resources (mostly RAM) on a single server.

review_title: Powerful tool, not a great fit for everyone.
description: Overall, our team decided to part ways with Sisense for more flexible and cost-effective options. We can certainly see the value, but perhaps it makes more sense for much larger companies with more staff specifically focused on embedded BI, perhaps as a full department.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: When adopted, Sisense met the criteria we had set out for embedded analytics for our end users and some internal business analytics. The pricing was initially agreeable.
cons: When exploring options, it was suggested to be low/no-code, which was not the case. As we got the ball rolling, we found their tools and visuals to be powerful, but very hard to customize, format, and match our brand. Support was one of the worst aspects. Many issues we brought up that blocked full deployment were not prioritized and left us seeing it as very overpriced for our use-case and business needs.

review_title: Data Visualization with Sisense
description: Sisense is powerful tool and I used it for data management for my customers.
author: Anil C.
pros: Sisense is powerful tool for data management, you can visualize your data with this app.
cons: It has many feature to use but there are things to developer should improve.

review_title: Great Analytics Tool
description: Compared to other tools like this one, I think this one offers the most for the cost. No real complaints about the tool whatsoever.
author: Jessica W.
pros: The ease of use, ease of setup, and the customizations.
cons: Roles and permissions for users could have more options.

review_title: Sisense is just another BI tool
description: I liked that it promised features that were lacking in our current tool, PowerBI. However, at the end of the day, it took an extremely long time to set up and didn't end up being the perfect solution that everyone hoped it would be.
author: Ryan M.
pros: I think that there are lots of really good integrations and some really strong reporting and notification options
cons: This product seemed to take a long time to implement, but I wasn't on the team building the reports so I cannot say what problems they encountered along the way.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Siense is feature-packed and getting better
description: We tried a number of different products before settling on Sisense. Ultimately, we are really pleased with our decision. What Sisense offers with the eCube concept is a perfect way to promote creative use of the data but still control sensitive information.
author: Loiane G.
pros: Sisense feels more modern than other alternatives we tried. The concept of eCubes is, by far, my favorite allowing a collection of data to be containerized for reporting in any way imaginable. Automated alerts are a newer feature that is becoming very useful. The look and feel of the system overall is really nice and pleasant to use. Plugins can add a lot of functionality that isn't included out-of-the-box.
cons: While Sisense is mostly really responsive and quick feeling, there are unexplained times of lag or unresponsiveness. Embedding visuals is difficult and they don't always work depending on where you are embedding them.

review_title: Decision Making
description: In this context, I would like to point out that my experience in using the Sisense software was the best. Very satisfied with the deliveries.
author: Renato B.
pros: The Sisense software has a very efficient and dynamic delivery.
cons: The observation against that I make about the Sisense software is in relation to the accesses being made by Web with authentication. For I had some problems.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Efficient BI Tool
description: Sisense is a comprehensive BI solution that excels in data integration, transformation, and visualization. Despite minor drawbacks, it provides a scalable, user-centric platform ideal for organizations seeking advanced analytics. Its adaptability makes it particularly effective for in-depth financial reporting and dynamic dashboards
author: Fabio P.
pros: Sisense's ability to handle complex data from multiple sources and its robust visualization tools stand out. The ElastiCube offers excellent flexibility, enabling custom transformations and efficient querying for large datasets. Its integration capabilities, including Salesforce and SQL, make it a powerful tool for seamless BI operations. The BloX widget is particularly valuable for creating interactive, customizable dashboards.
cons: The steep learning curve for new users and occasional performance lags with large datasets are downsides. Advanced features like BloX can be challenging without sufficient documentation, and the UI sometimes lacks intuitiveness. Customizations might require considerable effort

review_title: A user friendly BI tool for dashboard development
description: Worked with Sisense for about 1,5 years. The elasticubes were slightly difficult to manage and datasources had to be sometimes manually maintained. However, the Sisense interface for dashboard building is probably the most user-friendly among the existing BI tools, making dashboard building and exploration an easy feat.
author: Robert S.
pros: Drag and drop interface, the way all widgets snap in place. Also, the fact that you can customize the interface with your own JavaScript and CSS code. In terms of dashboard exploration, Sisense has this easy to dive in feature, where you can zoom in in a certain area of a chart, and find more details about that specific segment.
cons: The Elasticub manager is a bit heavy environment, where data modeling sometimes is cumbersome. One cannot get a quick preview of data mashuo output.

review_title: Mgr Support
description: As a product Sisense is good however from performance point of view, there is a lot of area improvement is needed from large data point of view. Understand how customers use the product and based on that follow the testing pattern.
author: Devesh K.
pros: Product is good but need lot of improvement.
cons: performance needs to be improve based on the large data the way customers uses

review_title: Essentially helpful software in tracking KPIs.
description: Overall okay experience with Sisense compared to the previous tool we’re using.
author: John Epok P.
pros: Dashboards - basic and complex. For complex, need backend support. API integrations to Zendesk which is a very nifty feature.
cons: A bit tricky when complex dashboards are being done. Lacks features on further customization such as dashboard design.

review_title: Sisense has been a key component of our marketing product offering for 3 years. Our clients love it.
author: Julien D.
pros: The front end of Sisense is what I like the most about this Software. Whether you are designing a Dashboard or using it you can expect and smooth and intuitive experience. From a designer standpoint: the basic charts and features of data visualization are available in the standard tool. Once you are familiar with them, you find the need to take it to the next level. Next thing you know you find yourself leveraging Sisense online resources, adding new widgets, and updating javascript very easily to make your dashboard look the way you want. From a user standpoint, looking at data, drilling and exporting is simple to figure out even without training.
cons: I have experienced a few limitations with Sisense. When you export a dashboard into an image it doesn't look too good. I find myself taking screenshots instead which can sometimes become time consuming. I've also been a little frustrated with not being to sort data as wanted in ascending, descending or alphabetical order. I experienced a situation where I identified a design flaw for a supported widget and we were asked to financially support the development to fix the flaw. Which we didn't. We still really appreciate the tool and its many benefits overall.

review_title: SiSense Customer Survey 12-04-2018
description: For what is it, it strike a good balance of functionality for the price. It did not require a lot of in depth training or professional services to get the software up and running.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The ease in setting up the software and future software upgrades. The use of the software is pretty straight forward. The use of webinars and 10 day startup program made it fairly easy to get started and become successful. The user support though the use of additional plug-Ins to improve functionality is a great way to enhance the usefulness of the product without a lot of time and/or expense.
cons: They should include a report writing feature, that will allow users to create formatted reports beyond graphical dashboards. Also I would like to see a more varied color palette for the charts beyond the basic color palette. Some competitors include both these things to which make for a more robust product.

review_title: Sisense is a useful tool that will be better once it gains more functionality
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It is easy to pull in data and get a dashboard created quickly. It is also easy to use the elasticube manager to quickly manipulate data with the GUI and basic SQL.
cons: The connectors are limited as are the functionality of the dashboards. If Sisense had native connectors to more data sources it would be able to gain many more users. It is most effective if you already have a database built out and the resources to develop the data connections that you need. The dashboards also have some very basic limitations, like being able to change the orientation/order/size of labels on graphs. Also there is no way to have a widget cover more than one row, which greatly limits the possibilities for layouts.

review_title: BI tool review
description: Very positive, it responds to our basic BI requirements. Customer support is very helpful and responsive
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Ease of use, flexibility, open framework (you get a basic offer which you can customize as you go), backend technology is very powerful.
cons: Very basic UI and out of the box visualization features, Elasticube is an outdated tool, no support for languages other than an old SQL version with limited functions supported.

review_title: Reporting Freedom
description: Moving reporting from Analytics to users, automation of management reporting, greater insight into the business performance
author: Elmira R.
pros: Ability to connect multiple data sources, great tools for data enrichment and user administration. SiSense has infinite capacity to facilitate future developments, user friendly, very intuitive interface.
cons: There is nothing that I could say that I like least of this software, it is very cutting edge and continue improving with every version.

review_title: Best BI tool, but lackluster customer service
author: Robert A.
pros: Really good dashboards and widgets. Allows Geo-spatial widgets and charts
cons: The customer service is none. They do not have a number despite being one of the more expensive BI tools.

review_title: Great product. Easy to create and share dashboards, though complicated data modeling.
description: Greatly embedded dashboards, simple sharing, and collaboration, embedded analytics for new products. Fast implementation cycle.
author: Maayan P.
pros: Easy to create, share and embed dashboards. Mashing up data from multiple resources is done easily. Fast implementation cycle for simple dashboards. Great support team.
cons: Complicated data modeling and lack of API documentation. Sometimes requires advanced data modeling knowledge to solve simple challenges.

review_title: Versatile tool for daily reporting but sometimes takes too much time to load.
author: Gabriel Z.
pros: How quickly the data engineers can put together a dashboard for us.
cons: Loading times, sometimes a chart can take up to 15 minutes to refresh or might even throw an error.

review_title: Great tool for those with SQL know how
description: Greater flexibility, control, and freedom with data.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I like the speed and streamlined SQL language it enables. It has a great interface and customer support is fantastic.
cons: SQL knowledge is required so this is not meant for the casual business user (though SQL experts can create dashboards for business users to monitor).

review_title: Great dashboarding tool, very easy and quick to implement
description: Within months we have implemented advanced management dashboards over multiple business domains such as Cross-Company KPI's, Sales & Forecasting, Technical Services, HR, etc. We have managed to shift the extended management into daily business reviews of streamlined terminologies and KPI's.
author: Yossi A.
pros: Time to implement ; Visualization ; Self explanatory for users ; Pulse functionality ; Great Customer Success and Support team ; Available ecosystem of add-ons ; Constantly evolving & improving
cons: Missing some basic functionalities (but for some there are available add-ons and solid roadmap) Very easy to ramp up and implement the basics, but getting tough on the advanced analytics concepts (can be mitigated with an additional DWH layer)

review_title: Great Intelligence for Business and Technology!
description: My company has been using SiSense for almost two years as an internal tool for quickly creating dashboards for both business and technical needs. Since our data sets live anywhere from Google Docs to MySQL to IBM Netezza, SiSense has greatly increased our ability to expose our total data asset for visualization and has allowed us make better decisions - faster. Other platforms simply do not offer the flexibility and ease of use that we required.
author: Jim H.
pros: We have had a great relationship with the SiSense technical support staff that has worked both ways: they provide great insight and feedback into how to best leverage our data asset and we have given some interesting use cases that have been built into the product. Additionally, since SiSense connects to almost every data storage platform our there we have continuously used SiSense whenever we need to get a quick peak under the hood at our data asset in different systems.
cons: No true cons - our major challenge has been taking our enormous asset and figuring out the best approach to organizing that data in the Elasticube framework. The support that we get from SiSense has been critical in ensuring that we can work around those challenges as they occur.

review_title: The very best BI platform that I have worked with hands down.
description: Sisense allowed us to implement complex analytics solutions with data acquisition from many data sources . The overall performance of the ElastiCube and out of the box data adapters gave us the tools we needed.
author: Dave R.
pros: Having it all delivered over the web has simplified and accelerated our ability to deliver high quality solutions quickly and cost effectively. It's great no to have to have any fat client foot print on any of our workstations or mobile devices.
cons: Always looking for more features and functionality. In particular, being able to produce columnar multi page reports on the same platform would be a killer capability.

review_title: Great BI and analytics all in one platform
description: Having a single place for the entire BI and DW needs
author: Kfir M.
pros: Ease of use, support and professional services are great. Can be single platform for the entire BI and Data warehouse needs.
cons: There are no faced disadvantages, this is the best analytics software in the market today. Also, if there was a missing feature (such as linux support) they are providing a great road map and timelines for this.
